svg.title: MediRisk Intelligence Platform — pipeline infographic
svg.desc: Visual summary of the full MediRisk data pipeline from raw sources to live dashboard, with key stats at each stage

g.text: PySpark · Delta Lake · Snowflake · MLlib · Streamlit

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How was the MediRisk synthetic data generated?')
sendPrompt('What is the fraud rate in MediRisk?')
sendPrompt('What AUC-ROC did the MediRisk model achieve?')
sendPrompt('How many unit tests does MediRisk have?')
sendPrompt('What are the data sources in MediRisk?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Bronze layer in MediRisk')
g.text: Delta Lake · Schema enforcement · DQ tagging · Partitioned by month/state

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Silver layer in MediRisk')
g.text: PySpark · Deduplication via window functions · Null guards · Date casting
Age bands · High-risk flags · Risk tiers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Gold feature engineering layer in MediRisk')
g.text: 90-day rolling windows · 30-day patient aggregations · Composite risk scores
Provider outlier detection · Patient risk tiers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the fraud detection model in MediRisk')
sendPrompt('Explain the Snowflake layer in MediRisk')
sendPrompt('Explain the Streamlit dashboard in MediRisk')
g.text: Executive overview · Fraud alerts · Trend analysis
Real-time fraud flags · Patient risk lookup · Monthly KPIs

svg.text: Orchestrated by Apache Airflow · 31 pytest unit tests · GitHub: saiganesh47/mediRisk-intelligence-platform
